CREDIT AND SECURITY AGREEMENT
Northwind Invoice Facility — Term Loan

Section 4.1 — Financial Covenants; Debt Service Coverage.
The Borrower shall maintain a Debt Service Coverage Ratio of not less than 1.25 to 1.00,
calculated on a trailing twelve-month basis and tested monthly as of each fiscal month end.

Section 5.3 — Portfolio Quality; Receivables Aging.
Receivables aged in excess of forty-five (45) days shall not exceed fifteen percent (15%)
of the aggregate outstanding receivables in the pool. The Servicer shall deliver an aging
report weekly for each test date.

Section 6.2 — Liquidity Reserve.
Borrower shall maintain a liquidity reserve equal to at least ten percent (10%) of the
outstanding principal balance, reviewed monthly.
